subcodes.first_line: O radiant poet and skilled composer! The themes of thy verses were wondrous, and thy exalted lines flowed like running water [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاعر باهر و ناظم ماهر مضمون اشعار بدیع بود و ابیات جلیل در سلاست آب روان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
